# Strategy Labs (KettleStrat)

Strategy Labs (served at KettleStrat.com) is a comprehensive, production-grade business planning and strategy suite designed to help entrepreneurs, founders, and strategists map, analyze, and build their business models.

## Tech Stack
- **Frontend:** React 19, Vite 8, Tailwind CSS 4, Lucide Icons, Motion (framer-motion).
- **Backend/API:** Node.js, Express, Vercel Serverless Functions.
- **Database & Auth:** Firebase client SDK (v12) and Firebase Admin SDK (v13).
- **AI Engine:** Gemini API integrations (`@google/genai` and `@google/generative-ai`).
- **File Exporters:** `docx` (Word document generator), `jspdf`/`html2canvas` (PDF report exporter).

---

## Key Features & Component Map
- **Strategic Mapping Tools:**
  - SWOT Analysis (`SwotView.tsx`)
  - PESTEL Analysis (`PestelView.tsx`)
  - Porter's Five Forces (`PorterForcesView.tsx`)
  - Lean Canvas & Business Model Canvas (`LeanCanvasView.tsx`, `BusinessModelCanvas.tsx`)
  - Ansoff & BCG Matrices (`AnsoffMatrixView.tsx`, `BcgMatrixView.tsx`)
  - Value Chain & Customer Journey (`ValueChainView.tsx`, `CustomerJourneyView.tsx`)
- **Financial Planning Suite:**
  - P&L Cost Splitting (3-year projection tracking OpEx, salaries, overheads, and dynamic Breakeven calculation).
  - Pre-trading Startup Cost Calculator.
  - Personal Survival Budget & Sourcing of Finance logs.
- **Interactive Assistance:**
  - Real-Time Speech-to-Text (STT) dictation queue preventing race conditions.
  - Gemini-powered AI Strategy Consultant (`AIConsultant.tsx`) offering contextual business planning feedback.

---

## Security & Architecture Rules
- **Row-Level Security (RLS):**
  - Configured in `firestore.rules`.
  - All users can read/write their own canvases, but administrative variables (`role` and `isPaidTier`) are immutable for non-admin accounts.
- **Data Integrity:**
  - Backend API requests are sanitized using `sanitizeString` to prevent XSS.
  - Centralized prototype pollution protection (`isSafeKey`) guards all bracket-notation operations.
- **Dependency Pinning:**
  - All packages in `package.json` are exact-pinned (no `^` or `~` ranges) to prevent dependency hijacking.
